body:
Good morning, Alexandria friends!

Happy Tuesday!

I feel like this retrograde has my brain lagging like a 90s Compaq. So I will leave you with just these words of wisdom:

Remember to be the feral trans shitposter you want to see in the world today!

I hope you all have a wonderful day! 🖤🖤🖤
